# Artifact Schema & Unified Creation System

## Problem
Storyboard has multiple artifact types (prototype, component, canvas, object, record, flow, external prototype) created via different surfaces (widget menu, command palette, workspace button). Each surface has its own form logic, validation, and fields — leading to bugs, missing features, and drift.

## Solution: Three Layers

### 1. Artifact Schema (source of truth)
A declarative JSON schema per artifact type defining:
- **Fields**: name, title, description, location, format, url, etc.
- **Validation**: required, pattern, uniqueness constraints
- **Defaults**: per-field defaults
- **Operations**: create, edit, delete, duplicate

### 2. Central API + CLI
- `storyboard artifact create <type>` — validates against schema, performs FS ops
- `storyboard artifact edit <type> <id>` — update metadata
- `storyboard artifact delete <type> <id>` — safe removal
- `storyboard artifact list [type]` — enumerate artifacts
- Server endpoints: `POST/PATCH/DELETE /_storyboard/artifact`

### 3. Unified UI Components
- Single `<ArtifactForm type={type} />` component driven by schema
- Renders correct fields, validation, and actions for any artifact type
- Used identically across all surfaces (command palette, add widget menu, workspace)

## Artifact Types & Fields (Draft)

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| prototype | name | title, description, author, icon, tags, team |
| external-prototype | name, url | title, description, author |
| component | name, location, format | title |
| canvas | name | title, description |
| object | name | (freeform JSON body) |
| record | name | (array with id per entry) |
| flow | name | $global, (freeform with $ref support) |

## Roles

- **Leader (me)**: Plan, coordinate, synthesize into final spec on this markdown
- **Sketcher**: Create story components for `<ArtifactForm>` unified UI
- **Architect**: Define the schema format, API endpoints, CLI interface, validation rules

Schema-driven form component at `src/components/ArtifactForm/`:

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={handleCreate} />
```

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial |
| `external-prototype` | name, url | title, description, author, folder |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create external-prototype --name figma --url https://...
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL | external-prototype |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype:** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**external-prototype:** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json

```

### DELETE /


### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

# ArtifactForm — Rebuilt UI

Schema-driven unified creation form at `src/components/ArtifactForm/`

## Modes (matching reference images)

1. **Type Picker** — SegmentedControl across top to switch between all 7 types
2. **Compact** — ActionMenu dropdown + required-only fields

- Segmented type selector (full) or dropdown (compact)
- Schema-driven field rendering (text, url, textarea, code, select, checkbox)
- JSON validation for code fields
- Pattern validation with hints
- Required field enforcement
- Proper Primer React styling with CSS Modules
- 11 stories covering all variants

## Stories
- TypePicker / CompactTypePicker
- CreatePrototype / CreateExternalPrototype
- CreateCanvas / CreateComponent
- CreateObject / CreateRecord / CreateFlow
- EditPrototype / UnknownType

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:

// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]

```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

# Artifact Schema & Unified Creation System

## Problem
Storyboard has multiple artifact types (prototype, component, canvas, object, record, flow, external prototype) created via different surfaces (widget menu, command palette, workspace button). Each surface has its own form logic, validation, and fields — leading to bugs, missing features, and drift.

## Solution: Three Layers

### 1. Artifact Schema (source of truth)
A declarative JSON schema per artifact type defining:
- **Fields**: name, title, description, location, format, url, etc.
- **Validation**: required, pattern, uniqueness constraints
- **Defaults**: per-field defaults
- **Operations**: create, edit, delete, duplicate

### 2. Central API + CLI
- `storyboard artifact create <type>` — validates against schema, performs FS ops
- `storyboard artifact edit <type> <id>` — update metadata
- `storyboard artifact delete <type> <id>` — safe removal
- `storyboard artifact list [type]` — enumerate artifacts
- Server endpoints: `POST/PATCH/DELETE /_storyboard/artifact`

### 3. Unified UI Components
- Single `<ArtifactForm type={type} />` component driven by schema
- Renders correct fields, validation, and actions for any artifact type
- Used identically across all surfaces (command palette, add widget menu, workspace)

## Artifact Types & Fields (Draft)

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| prototype | name | title, description, author, icon, tags, team |
| external-prototype | name, url | title, description, author |
| component | name, location, format | title |
| canvas | name | title, description |
| object | name | (freeform JSON body) |
| record | name | (array with id per entry) |
| flow | name | $global, (freeform with $ref support) |

## Roles

- **Leader (me)**: Plan, coordinate, synthesize into final spec on this markdown
- **Sketcher**: Create story components for `<ArtifactForm>` unified UI
- **Architect**: Define the schema format, API endpoints, CLI interface, validation rules

## Status: In Progress
